svg.title: Autonomous Cyber Defense Platform — Full Architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end flow from data sources through detection, correlation, risk scoring, response, storage and dashboard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Log Collection Engine and what sources it supports')
sendPrompt('How are Nginx and Apache web logs collected and normalized?')
sendPrompt('How is simulated FortiGate firewall data ingested?')
sendPrompt('How is API traffic captured and sent to the pipeline?')
sendPrompt('Show me the full code for the Log Collection and Normalization engine')
g.text: Unified schema · High throughput · Python / Fluent Bit

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are the Kafka topic design and Docker Compose setup for the streaming engine?')
sendPrompt('Show me the full Rule-based and ML detection engine code')
g.text: SQLi · XSS · Brute force · API abuse

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me the ML anomaly detection module using Isolation Forest and XGBoost trained on CIC-IDS2017')
sendPrompt('Explain the AI SOC Assistant LLM integration in the detection layer')
sendPrompt('Show me the full Correlation Engine code with graph-based attack chain detection')
g.text: Multi-signal grouping · Neo4j graph · attack chains

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me the Risk Scoring Engine with dynamic asset value, frequency and severity scoring')
g.text: Asset value · severity · frequency · dynamic score

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me the auto-response and manual approval SOAR engine code with playbook support')
g.text: Block IP · rate limit · disable user

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me the manual approval workflow in the SOAR engine')
sendPrompt('Show me the attack simulation red team module scripts for brute force, SQLi, port scan and DDoS')
g.text: Red team · brute force · SQLi · DDoS

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the full storage layer setup with ClickHouse, Elasticsearch and PostgreSQL?')
sendPrompt('How is Elasticsearch used for log search and investigation in the SOC platform?')
sendPrompt('What tables and schemas are needed in PostgreSQL for the SOC platform?')
sendPrompt('Show me the full FastAPI gateway code with REST endpoints and WebSocket streaming')
sendPrompt('Show me the full SOC React dashboard with real-time charts, alert triage, AI assistant and incident reports')
sendPrompt('How do I set up Grafana dashboards for the SOC platform?')
sendPrompt('Show me the Incident Report Generator that outputs attack timeline, root cause and recommendations')
